---
title: "Developers"
toc: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

Developer hub for architecture, tooling, tests, contracts, and release process.

This section is **not required** for normal use. If you are reading it, you are probably doing at least one of:

- adding a kernel/tail option
- changing a sampler / model component
- extending prediction/plotting/summary behavior
- preparing a release or CI workflow

Wrapper-first note: user-facing documentation should default to `dpmix()` / `dpmgpd()` for one-arm models and `dpmix.causal()` / `dpmgpd.causal()` for causal models.
Internal pages in this section can describe `bundle()` + `mcmc()` when implementation detail matters.

::: {.callout-important .devnote}
## Developer notes

Treat registry metadata as the primary extension entry point: it defines supported signatures, defaults, and compatibility. When possible, reuse shared bundle/runner/consumer layers instead of writing workflow-specific code.
:::

{{< include _includes/golden-rules.md >}}

## Core pages

- [Architecture](architecture.qmd)
- [Tools](tools.qmd)
- [Testing](testing.qmd)
- [Site build](site-build.qmd)
- [Conventions](conventions.qmd)
- [Spec and contracts](spec-and-contracts.qmd)
- [Registry](registry.qmd)
- [Add kernel](add-kernel.qmd)
- [Add tail option](add-tail-option.qmd)
- [Causal internals](causal-internals.qmd)
- [Releasing](releasing.qmd)

{{< include _includes/where-to-change-what.md >}}

{{< include _includes/common-pitfalls.md >}}

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Spec And Contracts](spec-and-contracts.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
